features.title: PHASE Implementation
features.description: Phase-aware MAPs with per-phase brain configuration. Sequential context injection via /phase command.

features.title: Protocol Voice Pass
features.description: Coaching voice for all TL;DRs and digests. Core protocol rewrite to match current reality.

features.title: Community Hub CLI
features.description: /hub command — install, fork, share, find community content. Smart sharing with quality scoring and privacy auto-fix.

features.title: Drop-in Commands
features.description: Scripts in .soma/amps/scripts/commands/ become /soma commands instantly. No restart needed.

features.title: Core Protocol System
features.description: scope:core protocols document built-in behavior without wasting prompt tokens. 5 core protocols established.

added: Natural muscle heat detection — scripts and file edits bump related muscles automatically.
Migration system — soma doctor checks, fixes, and migrates workspaces between versions.
Community template sync — boot fetches latest protocols from community repo.
Script theming — σ branding, clean exits, BSL footer on all shipped scripts.
soma-rebrand — ecosystem-wide search/replace for branding changes.
changed: Triggers consolidation — keywords, topic, triggers merged into single activation list.
All repo READMEs refreshed with consistent voice and branding.
License change date corrected to September 2027.
fixed: Runtime delegation — soma-beta now includes cli.js and Pi runtime files.
Fresh installs include version field in settings.json.
Dangerous CI workflow disabled — prevented accidental source publication.

added: Published to npm. npm install -g meetsoma — runtime downloads on first run.
Engine updated to Pi 0.61.1. Keybinding stability, session path fixes, suspend/resume.
AMPS overview documentation. The four layers explained as one system.
Migration guide. Coming from CLAUDE.md or .cursorrules — here's how Soma does it differently.
Troubleshooting page with common issues and fixes.
Collapsible docs sidebar with section icons.
Known Gaps sections in docs — honest about heat system limitations and what's being fixed.
changed: Heat system docs corrected. Dual storage model documented.
Docs reorganised into 5 sections: First Steps, Core Concepts, Workflows, Customization, Reference.

added: New install experience. Run soma and it introduces itself with typing animation, rotating concepts, interactive Q&A.
soma focus — start a session primed for a topic. Relevant content loads hotter.
soma --map — load a workflow template with pre-configured tools and protocols.
MAP system. Reusable workflow templates that chain scripts, muscles, and protocols.
Muscle trigger engine. Muscles auto-activate when focus keywords match their tags.
13 bundled scripts. Codebase navigation, memory tracing, session focus, plan management.
23 documentation pages. Models, keybindings, themes, settings, sessions, prompts, skills, extending.
30 automated E2E tests verify branding, paths, models, and infrastructure.
Personality engine. 22 Q&A topics, every answer different.
Scratch notes persist across sessions.
changed: Engine updated to 0.61.0. Keybinding manager, JSONL export/import, session forking, lazy provider loading.
License: BSL 1.1. Source-available, converts to MIT on 2027-09-18.
npm package is now a lightweight launcher. Runtime downloads separately.

added: /scan-logs — search previous tool calls and results across sessions.
/scrape — intelligent doc discovery and scraping from URLs.
Session warnings. Tool usage stats from previous session shown on boot.
Scratch notes. Timestamped notes that persist across sessions.
Grace period setting. Configurable delay before auto-breathe rotates.
Guard v2. Require reading relevant muscles before dangerous commands.
changed: System prompt trimmed ~19%. Less noise, same intelligence.

added: Capability router for inter-extension communication.
Session rotation via signal file. Auto-breathe rotates without command context.
Per-session log files with auto-incrementing names.
Restart-required detection with statusline indicator.
Changelog pipeline and chain-of-thought tracing tool.
Self-analysis command. Muscle health, divergence, orphan detection.
Tool gates. Require reading muscles before dangerous commands.
Grace period setting for auto-breathe.
Scratch notes with session IDs, date sections, auto-inject.
Polyglot script discovery.
Periodic auto-commit for crash resilience.
changed: Auto-breathe rotation is immediate when preload exists.
Self-awareness protocols consolidated into configuration guides.

added: Auto-breathe mode. Proactive context management with configurable thresholds.
Identity chain. Layered identity from project, parent, and global directories.
Heat system. Protocols and muscles have temperature scores that rise with use and decay with neglect.
Protocol loading by heat. Hot loads in full, warm loads a summary, cold skips.
Preload system. The agent writes a briefing for its next self before rotating.
Context warnings at 50%, 70%, 80%. Auto-exhale at 85%.
Muscle discovery by keywords. Focus scoring matches muscles to the current task.
Settings cascade. Project overrides parent overrides global.
9 core modules: discovery, identity, heat, muscles, protocols, settings, preload, prompt, utils.
changed: System prompt compiled fresh each boot from identity, protocols, muscles, and context.

added: Compiled system prompt. Identity, protocols, muscles, scripts assembled at boot.
7 extensions: boot, breathe, guard, header, route, scratch, statusline.
Protocol and muscle frontmatter with heat scores, tags, domains.
Recursive content discovery for organized AMPS content.
Global ~/.soma/ directory with shared identity and settings.
Content installation from the community hub.
changed: Moved from single CLAUDE.md to layered AMPS system.
Scripts seeded on soma init instead of manual setup.

added: Auto-init on first soma run. Creates .soma/, detects project stack.
/inhale and /breathe commands for session continuation.
Context warnings at configurable thresholds.
Hub content installation with dependency resolution.
Extension scaffolding during init.
Protocols and Heat System — behavioral rules loaded by temperature, heat rises through use, decays through neglect
Muscle loading at boot — sorted by heat, loaded within configurable token budget
Settings chain — `settings.json` with resolution: project → parent → global
Mid-session heat tracking — auto-detects protocol usage from tool results
Domain scoping — `applies-to` frontmatter + `detectProjectSignals()`
Breath cycle commands — `/exhale`, `/inhale`, `/pin`, `/kill`
Script awareness — boot surfaces `.soma/scripts/` inventory
9 core modules — discovery, identity, protocols, muscles, settings, init, preload, utils, index
